callGraph.callee:
[
        "# Memory",
        "",
        "Auto-generated from conversations. Updated on each turn.",
        "",
        ...this.memories.map((m) => `- ${m}`),
      ].join

results
      .filter((r): r is NonNullable<typeof r> => r !== null && r.content.length > 0)
      .sort

this.store.documents
        .map((doc) => ({ doc, score: cosineSimilarity(queryEmbedding, doc.embedding) }))
        .filter((s) => s.score > 0.5)
        .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
        .slice

this.store.documents
        .map((doc) => ({ doc, score: cosineSimilarity(queryEmbedding, doc.embedding) }))
        .filter((s) => s.score > 0.5)
        .sort
